title: 2020 NDC Tracker
summary: Countries' intention to update or enhance there 2020 NDCs
description: The 2020 NDC Tracker keeps track of which countries have signaled they will update or enhance their 2020 national climate commitments (NDCs).
cautions: Some nations have signaled that the impacts of the coronavirus pandemic may delay their submission of updated or enhanced NDCs. While many will submit in 2020 as scheduled, some have indicated they may do so in 2021 ahead of COP26. The information below does not reflect these possible delays.
citation: Climate Watch 2020 NDC Tracker. 2021. Washington, DC: World Resources Institute. Available online at: https://www.climatewatchdata.org/2020-ndc-tracker

title: Estimated 2030 & 2035 GHG Targets from NDCs
technical_title: Estimating global and national GHG emissions based on emissions reduction targets in countries’ Nationally Determined Contributions
summary: The new iconic visuals offer global and country-level GHG emissions estimates for 2030 and 2035 based on countries’ NDC targets, side-by-side country comparisons of near-term targets using a harmonized methodology, and comparisons of those targets against historical emissions from 1990, 2005, and 2019.
description: The visuals present estimated 2030 and 2035 emissions based on current NDC targets, calculated using a consistent methodology that accounts for data gaps and variations in target structures. The comparative view enables users to evaluate how targets stack up across countries and regions in absolute and relative terms. Additional layers show how each country’s future GHG emissions under NDCs compares to its historical emissions levels in 1990, 2005, and 2019, offering critical context for ambition tracking over time. These data visualizations are designed to complement the NDC Tracker’s submission mapping and ambition indicators, providing a cohesive and transparent picture of global mitigation efforts.
cautions: Please refer to our technical note to explore the full methodology.
